microsoft_ft: Drove **end-to-end product strategy** for Azure's resilience validation platform, standardizing shipment-lifecycle-style workflows across 45+ annual drills and delivering **$14M+ business impact** for enterprise partners including SAP, Walmart, and Databricks.

Led **0→1 roadmap and requirements definition** for an internal Resilience Automation Platform, building self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and scaled execution without headcount growth.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level validation program, defining KPIs, managing cross-functional delivery, and achieving a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months — establishing a continuous-validation model adopted org-wide.

Built and deployed an **AI-driven planning agent** that restructured drill-scheduling workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing logistics-style operational capacity by 21% across the team.

Directed 14 high-visibility cross-org recovery executions, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, requiring precise stakeholder alignment and real-time decision-making.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-driven workflow adoption** across 14 Azure service teams by leading user demos and training sessions, driving utilization of code-generation tools and saving **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Shaped the product roadmap by conducting **11+ structured customer interviews** with Azure engineering teams, surfacing critical feature gaps that led to intent-based YAML generation being prioritized for the next release cycle.

Improved data retrieval and AI model accuracy by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to a **semantic search platform**, reducing engineering lookup time by 83% across internal tools.
microsoft_2022: **Generated $3M in accelerated revenue** and reduced region launch timelines by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate manual operational toil, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of per-region effort** and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.

Built a **Power BI KPI dashboard** tracking automation coverage and toil metrics across 140+ teams, giving leadership data-driven visibility to prioritize roadmap investments and measure product success.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **logistics migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit robotics fleet OS transition, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime throughout the pilot rollout.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and backlog prioritization for a robotics software team, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to accelerate feature delivery.
Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, cutting the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release overhead.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM workflow that improved conversion tracking and customer adoption.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted site conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital channels and refining the customer engagement funnel.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering pricing model recommendations that improved per-job contribution margin for leadership.
